title: Settings
subtitle: Garden plan, colors, zones and further configuration

section_subtitles.garden_plan: Upload a floor plan image used as background for the interactive plan
section_subtitles.location: For weather data and frost warnings
section_subtitles.irrigation_zones: Define the zones of your irrigation system
section_subtitles.plant_categories: Available categories in the plant dialog (dropdown)
section_subtitles.color_presets: Preset colors for bloom periods, foliage and miscellaneous
section_subtitles.language: Display language of the user interface
section_subtitles.data: Export, import or reset garden data

color_presets.hint: These presets appear in the plant dialog when editing bloom periods, foliage, and miscellaneous intervals.

garden_plan.dropzone_title: Drag image here or click to upload
garden_plan.dropzone_sub: PNG, JPG or SVG · Recommended: min. 2000 px width

data.backup_hint: The export includes all data including photos and files. On import, existing data is added or updated — nothing is deleted. The API key is not exported.
data.delete_all_hint: Deletes everything — plants, settings, color presets, photos. Cannot be undone.
data.install_defaults_hint: Restores default color presets and settings. Plants and entries are kept. The AI API key is preserved.
data.delete_all_confirm1:
⚠️ WARNING: This action permanently deletes ALL data:

• All plants
• All photos and attachments
• All notes and entries
• All settings
• All color presets

This action CANNOT be undone!

Are you sure you want to continue?
data.delete_all_confirm2:
FINAL WARNING: All data will be permanently deleted.

Click OK again to proceed.
data.install_defaults_confirm:
Color presets and settings will be reset to their default values. Plants and entries are kept.

Proceed?
